paper_metadata.title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper presents E5, a family of state-of-the-art text embeddings that transfer well to a wide range of tasks. The model is trained in a contrastive manner with weak supervision signals from our curated large-scale text pair dataset (called CCPairs). E5 can be readily used as a general-purpose embedding model for any tasks requiring a single-vector representation of texts such as retrieval, clustering, and classification, achieving strong performance in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. We conduct extensive evaluations on 56 datasets from the BEIR and MTEB benchmarks. For zero-shot settings, E5 is the first model that outperforms the strong BM25 baseline on the BEIR retrieval benchmark without using any labeled data. When fine-tuned, E5 obtains the best results on the MTEB benchmark, beating existing embedding models with 40x more parameters.

extraction_data.innovation: E5 introduces a weakly-supervised contrastive pre-training framework using a curated large-scale text pair dataset (CCPairs) to learn high-quality general-purpose text embeddings. It achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot retrieval performance, outperforming BM25 without labeled data, and excels in fine-tuned settings on the MTEB benchmark.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl (2022-33 snapshot), Wikipedia, Reddit (2018–2022), S2ORC (scientific papers), MS-MARCO document ranking corpus, and other miscellaneous sources (e.g., SimpleWiki, GooAQ, WikiHow, YahooAnswers)
extraction_data.extension: Consistency-based data filtering technique that retains only text pairs ranked in the top-k by a model trained on noisy data, improving data quality and reducing overfitting.
extraction_data.research_problem: Learning high-quality text embeddings without relying on small-scale human-annotated data or heuristic noise
extraction_data.application: Zero-shot retrieval, few-shot text classification, zero-shot text classification, semantic textual similarity, text clustering
extraction_data.paper_title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces weakly-supervised contrastive pre-training for text embeddings, achieving state-of-the-art unsupervised performance on BEIR and MTEB benchmarks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CCPairs dataset (implied from context; not explicitly named but described as curated for contrastive learning)
extraction_data.application: Information retrieval, question answering, text classification, duplicate question detection, fact verification
extraction_data.research_problem: Text Embedding Quality and Zero-shot Transferability
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on MS-MARCO, NQ, and NLI datasets
extraction_data.extension: Uses mined hard negatives and re-ranker scores from SimLM for improved contrastive learning.
extraction_data.paper_title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training
